subtagline: A charity-run alert network for human rights. When a voice is silenced or a community is in crisis — you are the first to know.
mission_short: Defend human rights through real-time awareness

why.title: Why UnifyHeart exists
why.intro: We are not a news company. We are volunteers. We watch the wires so that human-rights stories cannot be drowned out.
why.p1_body: Every 10 minutes our network pulls from trusted human-rights organisations — Human Rights Watch, UN Human Rights, ReliefWeb, Reporters Without Borders, IFRC and more.
why.p2_body: Every story is filtered through one question: does this protect, defend or give voice to people whose rights are at risk?
why.p3_body: Browser push, phone push, email digest, RSS, Telegram — all free, all self-hosted, all without paid APIs or third-party trackers.

alerts.title: Be the first to act
alerts.subtitle: Every minute matters when a community is at risk. Choose how we reach you — every channel is free, private, and self-hosted. We never sell your data. We never run ads. Ever.
alerts.channel_push_desc: Instant alerts in Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari — even when the tab is closed.
alerts.channel_email_desc: Daily or weekly summary in your inbox. One-click unsubscribe.
alerts.channel_ntfy_desc: Install the free ntfy app, subscribe to our topic — no account, no fees.
alerts.channel_rss_desc: For your favourite reader (Feedly, Inoreader, NetNewsWire…).
alerts.push_denied: Browser blocked alerts. Allow them in your browser settings.
alerts.email_thanks: Almost there — check your inbox to confirm.

items.b: We do not sell attention. We never will.
Zero third-party scripts. Zero analytics resold.
Everything self-hosted on a single charity-funded server.
Code, sources and methodology are public.

footer.mission: UnifyHeart is a charity project. No paid advertising. No third-party trackers. No data sold. Forever free.
